Chicken Breast, Thighs & Tenders

Skinless Chicken Breast kg

Skinless Chicken Breast kg

15

.

49

/kg

$15.49/1kg

kg

Skinless chicken breast is lean, tender and super versatile—a true weeknight hero. With its mild flavour and juicy texture, it soaks up marinades like a dream and works in just about any dish, from stir-fries to salads. ● Packed with: Lean protein, vitamin B6, niacin, selenium and phosphorus. ● Cook options: Grill, bake, boil or pan-fry. ● Prep process: Rinse under cold water and pat dry with a paper towel. Trim any excess sinew or fat, then chop or cook how you like. Meal inspiration: ● Chicken tacos: Shred chicken and pair with your favourite taco toppings—this is no-fuss family kai! ● Chicken noodle soup: A soul-warming bowl packed with goodness—perfect for tamariki or cold days. ● Chicken pesto pasta: Perfect for a quick and tasty meal. Just top your pasta with grilled chicken, pesto and enjoy. Storage tips: Keep chilled and use within 2–3 days, or freeze for up to 9 months to lock in freshness.

Product of New Zealand

Products are subject to change and availability. Product information including images and allergens is provided by our suppliers to assist customers to select suitable products. However, this information may change at short notice and you should always check the product labels. We endeavor to keep all information up to date, but we cannot and do not guarantee accuracy and completeness of this information.
